REQUIRES.why_connected: Under the validated Connection, {target} is a prerequisite for {source}.
REQUIRES.learning_value: Recognizing this dependency helps organize how {target} supports understanding {source}.

APPLIED_IN.learning_value: Recognizing this application helps place {source} within the study of {target}.

EXTENDS.why_connected: Under the validated Connection, {source} adds to or modifies {target}.
EXTENDS.learning_value: Recognizing this extension helps organize {source} as a development of {target}.

FORMALIZES.why_connected: Under the validated Connection, {source} provides a formal expression of {target}.
FORMALIZES.learning_value: Recognizing this formalization helps connect the representation {source} with the idea {target}.

CONTRASTS_WITH.why_connected: The validated Connection marks a meaningful contrast between {source} and {target}.
CONTRASTS_WITH.learning_value: Recognizing this contrast helps keep the roles of {source} and {target} distinct.
